Description
format:
This system continuously monitors muscle activity, joint flexion, heart rate, and room temperature to support safe and effective arm rehabilitation. Please select a sensor to learn more about its role in the therapy process.

What does this system do?

  • · Tracks muscle effort in real time
  • · Measures arm flexion during movement
  • · Monitors heart rate to avoid overload
  • · Checks ambient temperature for comfort and safety

Select a sensor above to learn how it contributes to your recovery.

Measures electrical activity of muscles to evaluate muscle activation during arm movement.

Tracks the degree of joint bending to analyze arm posture and flexion during rehabilitation.

Monitors the patient's heart rate in bpm to detect stress or overexertion during the session.

Controls skin temperature to ensure safe operating conditions and identify anomalies.
